title: Scope and Span Stack Management
key_participants: C Extension (active_span / root_span / active_stack / create_stack / switch_stack)
two_layer_architecture: PHP userland (ScopeManager + Scope) wraps C-extension span stack (SpanStack, active_span, root_span, etc.). reconcileInternalAndUserland() is the bridge.

activate_span: ScopeManager: scopes[count] = scope  [push onto scopes array]
get_active_scope: ScopeManager → reconcileInternalAndUserland()  [sync C spans with PHP userland]
reconcile: iterate scopes from end, unset finished spans
reconcile: if scopes empty → call C root_span() → wrap in Span+SpanContext → create Scope → scopes[0] = scope
reconcile: call C active_span() → walk span.parent chain until currentSpanId found
reconcile: for each untracked C span → new Scope(this, new Span(cSpan, SpanContext)) → push to newScopes[]
reconcile: link parentContext chain for new scopes → push all to scopes[]
reconcile: return top new scope or existing topScope
return first scope where flag is truthy (not explicitly deactivated)
close_scope: ScopeManager: array_search(scope, scopes) → get index i
get_primary_root: ScopeManager: reset(scopes) → return first scope (root) or null
close_all_host_roots: ScopeManager: foreach hostRootScopes as scope → scope.close()  [triggers deactivate chain per scope]
stack_management_c_extension: Caller → active_stack(): SpanStack|null  [returns copy of current active SpanStack]
Caller → create_stack(): SpanStack  [creates new SpanStack; parent = currently active stack; inherits spanCreationObservers by ref]
Caller → switch_stack(SpanData|SpanStack|null): SpanStack|null|false  [switches active context to given stack/span, or to parent stack if null]
Caller → active_span(): SpanData|null  [returns SpanStack.active of current stack]
Caller → root_span(): RootSpanData|null  [returns root span of the active stack]

key_relationships: ScopeManager composes Scope[] (scopes array, ordered stack)
ScopeManager composes hostRootScopes[] (subset tracking distributed-tracing root spans)
ScopeManager owns rootContext: SpanContext (injected on construct for distributed tracing)
Scope holds ref to ScopeManager (calls deactivate on close)
Scope holds ref to Span (finishes on close if finishSpanOnClose=true)
Span wraps internalSpan (C-level SpanData); tracked via ObjectKVStore flags
SpanStack.parent links stacks hierarchically (created via create_stack)
SpanStack.active = current active SpanData on that stack
reconcileInternalAndUserland bridges C-extension SpanStack with PHP ScopeManager.scopes[]

SpanStack.note: Internal C class, not instantiated in PHP userland directly

important_notes: scopes[] is a flat ordered array acting as a stack; getActive() iterates from end (LIFO)
reconcileInternalAndUserland() auto-wraps C-level spans (e.g., created by DDTrace hooks) into PHP Scope objects so OpenTracing API stays consistent
ObjectKVStore flag 'ddtrace_scope_activated': null=not tracked, true=active, false=deactivated — used to skip non-activated spans in getActive()
finishSpanOnClose=false is used for root spans when DD_TRACE_GENERATE_ROOT_SPAN is set (Tracer.php:239-241)
hostRootScopes tracks request-level root spans; in distributed tracing these represent the entry point of the service
create_stack() inherits spanCreationObservers by reference so observer removal propagates to parent stacks
switch_stack(null) switches to parent of active stack; switch_stack(SpanData) switches to that span's stack
